info.description: REST + WebSocket backend for realtime chat (rooms, JWT auth, message history, reactions, notifications).
info.title: Chat Server API

post.summary: Add emoji reaction to a message

delete.summary: Remove emoji reaction from a message

parameters.description: Cursor: only messages with id < before_id
parameters.name: before_id

parameters.description: Specific refresh_token to revoke; omit to revoke all
parameters.name: body

get.description: Upgrade to WebSocket after JWT validation (membership checked). Send JSON: {"type":"chat","text":"..."}. Incoming events use JSON with id, from, room, text, sent_at.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Format: Bearer followed by a space and the token value.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
